mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01010400' THEN '산' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01010800' THEN '폭포' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01010900' THEN '계곡' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A01011200', 'A01011400', 'A01011600') THEN '바다' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01011700' THEN '호수' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01011800' THEN '강' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01011900' THEN '동굴' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A02010100', 'A02010200', 'A02010300', 'A02010600', 'A02010700') THEN '역사 관광지' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02010800' THEN '사찰' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02020300' THEN '온천/욕장/스파' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02020600' THEN '테마공원' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A02030100', 'A02030200', 'A02030300') THEN '체험' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02050200' THEN '기념/전망' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A02060100', 'A02060200', 'A02060300', 'A02060500', 'A02061200') THEN '문화시설' WHEN TRIP_TAG LIKE 'A03%' THEN '레포츠' ELSE '기타' END AS tripTagNm FROM TRIP WHERE TRIP_TAG IS NOT NULL ORDER BY tripTagNm ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TRIP ( TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIP_NM, TRIP_PATH_NM, TRIP_ADDR, TRIP_LAT, TRIP_LOT, TRIP_TAG, TRIP_CLSF, TRIP_CTPV, TRIP_GUNGU, TRIP_INQ_CNT ) VALUES ( #{tripContsId}, #{tripNm}, #{tripPathNm}, #{tripAddr}, #{tripLat}, #{tripLot}, #{tripTag}, #{tripClsf}, #{tripCtpv}, #{tripGungu}, #{tripInqCnt} )
mapper.select: SELECT T.TRIP_CONTS_ID, T.TRIP_NM, /* TRIP_PATH_NM이 NULL이면 첨부파일의 경로를 사용 */ NVL(T.TRIP_PATH_NM, AF.FILE_PATH_NM) AS TRIP_PATH_NM, T.TRIP_ADDR, T.TRIP_LAT, T.TRIP_LOT, T.TRIP_TAG, T.TRIP_CLSF, T.TRIP_CTPV, T.TRIP_GUNGU, T.TRIP_INQ_CNT, CASE WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A01010400' THEN '산' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A01010800' THEN '폭포' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A01010900' THEN '계곡' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG IN ('A01011200', 'A01011400', 'A01011600') THEN '바다' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A01011700' THEN '호수' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A01011800' THEN '강' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A01011900' THEN '동굴' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG IN ('A02010100', 'A02010200', 'A02010300', 'A02010600', 'A02010700') THEN '역사 관광지' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A02010800' THEN '사찰' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A02020300' THEN '온천/욕장/스파' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A02020600' THEN '테마공원' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG IN ('A02030100', 'A02030200', 'A02030300') THEN '체험' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG = 'A02050200' THEN '기념/전망' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG IN ('A02060100', 'A02060200', 'A02060300', 'A02060500', 'A02061200') THEN '문화시설' WHEN T.TRIP_TAG LIKE 'A03%' THEN '레포츠' ELSE '기타' END AS tripTagNm FROM TRIP T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( /* board_id별로 가장 첫 번째 파일(rn=1)만 미리 추출 */ SELECT board_id, file_path_nm FROM ( SELECT board_id, file_path_nm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY board_id ORDER BY BOARD_ID ASC) as rn FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE board_clsf = 'trip' /* 게시판 구분값 확인 필요 */ ) WHERE rn = 1 ) AF ON T.TRIP_CONTS_ID = AF.board_id WHERE T.TRIP_CONTS_ID = #{tripContsId}

SELECT A.*, B.TOTAL_CNT AS totalCnt FROM ( SELECT TT1.* FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS RNUM, T1.* FROM ( SELECT T.*, /* [수정] 기존 경로가 없으면 첨부파일 테이블의 경로를 사용 */ COALESCE(T.TRIP_PATH_NM, AF.FILE_PATH_NM) AS tripPathNm, /* [출력 매핑] DB의 코드를 화면에 표시할 한글명으로 변환 */ CASE WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01010400' THEN '산' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01010800' THEN '폭포' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01010900' THEN '계곡' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A01011200', 'A01011400', 'A01011600') THEN '바다' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01011700' THEN '호수' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01011800' THEN '강' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A01011900' THEN '동굴' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A02010100', 'A02010200', 'A02010300', 'A02010600', 'A02010700') THEN '역사 관광지' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02010800' THEN '사찰' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02020300' THEN '온천/욕장/스파' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02020600' THEN '테마공원' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A02030100', 'A02030200', 'A02030300') THEN '체험' WHEN TRIP_TAG = 'A02050200' THEN '기념/전망' WHEN TRIP_TAG IN ('A02060100', 'A02060200', 'A02060300', 'A02060500', 'A02061200') THEN '문화시설' WHEN TRIP_TAG LIKE 'A03%' THEN '레포츠' ELSE '기타' END AS tripTagNm FROM TRIP T LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT board_id, file_path_nm FROM ( SELECT board_id, file_path_nm, ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY board_id ORDER BY ROWID ASC) as rn FROM ATTACH_FILE WHERE board_clsf = 'trip' ) WHERE rn = 1 /* 각 게시물당 1번 파일만 선택 */ ) AF ON T.TRIP_CONTS_ID = AF.board_id WHERE 1=1
AND (T.TRIP_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%')
AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01010400' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01010800' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01010900' AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A01011200', 'A01011400', 'A01011600') AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01011700' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01011800' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01011900'
AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A02010100', 'A02010200', 'A02010300', 'A02010600', 'A02010700')
AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02010800' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02020300' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02020600' AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A02030100', 'A02030200', 'A02030300') AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02050200' AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A02060100', 'A02060200', 'A02060300', 'A02060500', 'A02061200') AND TRIP_TAG LIKE 'A03%'
AND TRIP_TAG NOT LIKE 'A01%' AND TRIP_TAG NOT LIKE 'A02%' AND TRIP_TAG NOT LIKE 'A03%'
AND TRIP_TAG = #{tripTag}
AND TRIP_CTPV = #{tripCtpv} AND TRIP_GUNGU = #{tripGungu}
ORDER BY TRIP_INQ_CNT DESC ORDER BY TRIP_CONTS_ID DESC
) T1 WHERE ROWNUM <= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + #{pageSize} ) TT1 WHERE RNUM >= #{pageSize} * (#{pageNo} - 1) + 1 ) A CROSS JOIN ( SELECT COUNT(*) TOTAL_CNT FROM TRIP WHERE 1=1
AND (TRIP_NM LIKE '%' || #{searchWord} || '%')
/* [중요] 아래 카테고리 검색 조건들은 상단과 동일하게 유지해야 카운트가 정확합니다 */
AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01010400' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01010800' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01010900' AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A01011200', 'A01011400', 'A01011600') AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01011700' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01011800' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A01011900'
AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A02010100', 'A02010200', 'A02010300', 'A02010600', 'A02010700')
AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02010800' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02020300' AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02020600' AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A02030100', 'A02030200', 'A02030300') AND TRIP_TAG = 'A02050200' AND TRIP_TAG IN ('A02060100', 'A02060200', 'A02060300', 'A02060500', 'A02061200') AND TRIP_TAG LIKE 'A03%'
AND TRIP_TAG NOT LIKE 'A01%' AND TRIP_TAG NOT LIKE 'A02%' AND TRIP_TAG NOT LIKE 'A03%'
AND TRIP_TAG = #{tripTag}
AND TRIP_CTPV = #{tripCtpv} AND TRIP_GUNGU = #{tripGungu} ) B
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIP_NM, TRIP_PATH_NM, TRIP_ADDR, TRIP_INQ_CNT FROM TRIP ORDER BY TRIP_INQ_CNT DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM <= 3

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT TRIP_CONTS_ID, TRIP_NM, TRIP_PATH_NM, TRIP_ADDR, TRIP_TAG, TRIP_CTPV, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY TRIP_CTPV ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE) as rn FROM TRIP WHERE TRIP_PATH_NM IS NOT NULL AND TRIP_CTPV IN (11, 26, 30, 31, 32, 39, 38) -- 예: 서울(11), 부산(26), 대전(30), 울산(31), 세종(32) 등 필요한 지역코드 ) WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE -- 가져온 지역들 사이에서도 순서를 랜덤하게 섞음
